title: Catalog freshness case after update propagation stalled
incident_summary: Customers are seeing outdated listings while freshness drift continues to rise.

alerts.title: Freshness lag
alerts.content: Index freshness lag increased from 2m to 28m.

alerts.title: Minor QPS dip
alerts.content: Search QPS dropped 4% during the same interval.

logs.title: Cache invalidator paused
logs.content: invalidation-worker paused due to stuck lease heartbeat.

logs.title: Indexer CPU elevated
logs.content: indexer CPU peaked at 74% but no throttling observed.

runbook_snippets.title: Stale cache mitigation
runbook_snippets.content: Resume invalidation worker, flush stale cache prefixes, and verify freshness trend.

runbook_snippets.title: Query ranking tuning
runbook_snippets.content: Do not tune ranking during freshness incidents.

timeline_notes.title: Lease service patch
timeline_notes.content: Lease service patch applied 15m before freshness lag began.

red_herrings: Marketing team launched a new campaign causing temporary search QPS variability.
true_root_cause: Cache invalidation worker paused after lease heartbeat failure
true_mitigation: Resume invalidation worker and flush stale cache keys
true_mitigation_aliases: restart invalidator then flush stale cache
resume cache invalidation and clear stale prefixes
